summary: Ran all three connector test suites (comprehensive, deep, router_unit). All 302 tests passed in under 1 second with no failures or skips. The pytest run exits with a coverage failure code due to the project-wide 25% coverage gate not being met (known issue), but the tests themselves all pass.
issues: Coverage gate failure: project-wide 25% threshold not met when running this subset (0.00% measured for just these modules against the full codebase coverage config). This is a known project-level issue (DEMO-006), not a test failure.
CoverageWarning: Module 'risk' was never imported during these tests.
